statements.sql: select "classes".*, (select count(*) from "users" inner join "class_student" on "users"."id" = "class_student"."student_id" where "classes"."id" = "class_student"."class_id") as "students_count", (select count(*) from "attendance_records" where "classes"."id" = "attendance_records"."class_id" and "status" = 'present') as "present_count", (select count(*) from "attendance_records" where "classes"."id" = "attendance_records"."class_id" and "status" = 'late') as "late_count", (select count(*) from "attendance_records" where "classes"."id" = "attendance_records"."class_id" and "status" = 'absent') as "absent_count", (select count(*) from "attendance_records" where "classes"."id" = "attendance_records"."class_id" and "status" = 'excused') as "excused_count", "class_professor"."professor_id" as "pivot_professor_id", "class_professor"."class_id" as "pivot_class_id", "class_professor"."created_at" as "pivot_created_at", "class_professor"."updated_at" as "pivot_updated_at" from "classes" inner join "class_professor" on "classes"."id" = "class_professor"."class_id" where "class_professor"."professor_id" = 16

explain.query: select "classes".*, (select count(*) from "users" inner join "class_student" on "users"."id" = "class_student"."student_id" where "classes"."id" = "class_student"."class_id") as "students_count", (select count(*) from "attendance_records" where "classes"."id" = "attendance_records"."class_id" and "status" = ?) as "present_count", (select count(*) from "attendance_records" where "classes"."id" = "attendance_records"."class_id" and "status" = ?) as "late_count", (select count(*) from "attendance_records" where "classes"."id" = "attendance_records"."class_id" and "status" = ?) as "absent_count", (select count(*) from "attendance_records" where "classes"."id" = "attendance_records"."class_id" and "status" = ?) as "excused_count", "class_professor"."professor_id" as "pivot_professor_id", "class_professor"."class_id" as "pivot_class_id", "class_professor"."created_at" as "pivot_created_at", "class_professor"."updated_at" as "pivot_updated_at" from "classes" inner join "class_professor" on "classes"."id" = "class_professor"."class_id" where "class_professor"."professor_id" = ?

statements.sql: select "users".*, "class_student"."class_id" as "pivot_class_id", "class_student"."student_id" as "pivot_student_id", "class_student"."created_at" as "pivot_created_at", "class_student"."updated_at" as "pivot_updated_at" from "users" inner join "class_student" on "users"."id" = "class_student"."student_id" where "class_student"."class_id" in (3, 6)

statements.sql: select COUNT(*) as total_records, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'present' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as present_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'late' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as late_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'absent' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as absent_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'excused' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as excused_count from "attendance_records" where "class_id" in (6, 3) limit 1

explain.query: select COUNT(*) as total_records, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'present' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as present_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'late' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as late_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'absent' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as absent_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'excused' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as excused_count from "attendance_records" where "class_id" in (?, ?) limit 1
